EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for general Direct leads at the third attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Direct Lead (General)_3rd Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Information required to move forward with insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’m still struggling to reach you to help you with your business insurance quote.
To provide the best quote for you I need to understand your business and the level of cover you might require. Is there a good time for me to give you a call?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
You can also get a quote online via our website www.kingsbridge.co.uk.
I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
